ddls:
CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the policy */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., personal auto, corporate auto) */,
  "coverage" TEXT /* Level of coverage */,
  "renew_offer_type" TEXT /* Type of renew offer */,
  "monthly_premium_auto" REAL /* Monthly premium for auto coverage */,
  "policy_status" TEXT /* Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled) */,
  "policy_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the policy */,
  "policy_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the policy */,
  "premium_payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of premium payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who sold the policy */,
  "effective_to_date" TEXT /* Date the policy is effective to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the claim */,
  "claim_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was made */,
  "claim_amount" REAL /* Amount of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Status of the claim (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the claim */,
  "claim_resolution_date" TEXT /* Date the claim was resolved */,
  "months_since_last_claim" INTEGER /* Months since the last claim was made */,
  "months_since_policy_inception" INTEGER /* Months since the policy was inception */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_class" TEXT /* Class of the vehicle (e.g., two-door car, four-door car, SUV) */,
  "vehicle_size" TEXT /* Size of the vehicle (e.g., medsize) */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel used by the agent (e.g., agent, call center) */,
  "agent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "agent_phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "agent_role" TEXT /* Role of the agent (e.g., sales, underwriting, claims) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, customer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_policies" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy associated with the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "policy_id")
)
column_names: ID of the customer who owns the policy

Status of the policy (e.g., active, inactive, cancelled)
Frequency of premium payments (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually)
